title: UFO files bombshell: China, Russia, recovered craft to ‘reverse-engineering’ alien tech?
description: Newly declassified UFO files spark explosive claims of a global race to reverse-engineer mysterious craft, raising chilling questions about surveillance, secrecy, and what world powers might already know.

title: Burrell Township Library to host renowned UFO, Bigfoot researcher Stan Gordon
description: The Burrell Township Library will host UFO and Bigfoot researcher Stan Gordon from 1 to 3 p.m. Saturday.

title: Critical Thinking Tips for Close Encounters With UFO Claims
description: Given the unique importance of a potential UFO visit, confirmation requires a high standard of evidence. Here are simple tips for your inevitable close encounters with UFO claims.

title: As UAP Declassification Begins, Psychologists Release First Report on Possible Psychological Implications
description: First report of its kind examines psychological impact of UAP/NHI disclosure and calls for a national preparedness framework

title: Hungry for a real ‘disclosure day,’ some UFO watchers are miffed at Trump - The Washington Post
